intent_summary: Integrate Field Monitor vendor tier into Talent Flow for LinkedIn public profile change detection. field_monitor.* tables are vendor staging layer. Seeds 100 LinkedIn URLs from people.people_master into field_monitor.url_registry. Creates field_state entries for current_title and current_company. Bridge module in hub Middle layer reads detected changes from vendor tier and fires EVENT_TALENTFLOW_MOVE into existing movement engine. Sample-gated to 100 records.
vendor_tier: field_monitor.* (same tier as vendor.people, vendor.blog, vendor.ct)
go_condition: Seed SQL runs clean (100 url_registry rows, 200 field_state rows). Parser KV entries created. linkedin_monitor.py imports clean and bridge_changes() reads from vendor tier. Kill switches halt execution. pipeline.md updated.

agent_routing.db_agent: Run seed_linkedin_urls.sql against Neon. Verify 100 url_registry rows, 200 field_state rows. Idempotent.
agent_routing.builder: Create linkedin_monitor.py, seed scripts, update __init__.py and pipeline.md. All logic in Middle layer.
agent_routing.auditor: Verify CTB, IMO, vendor tier pattern, kill switches, no downstream modifications.

constraints: Do not expand scope beyond allowed_paths
Do not modify existing movement_engine.py, state_machine.py, or movement_rules.py
field_monitor.* is vendor tier — bridge READS only, never writes
All logic in hub Middle layer
Kill switches KILL_TALENT_FLOW_MONITOR and KILL_LINKEDIN_SEED enforced
